fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the team.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the team.

fields.name: Next Task Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the next task involving the team.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval. For example, the Next To-do Date field shows information related to the to-dos that should be carried out for that interval only.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Contact Company Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies that fields such as Next To-do Date only display information that is related to to-dos that are linked to contact companies If this field contains Yes.

fields.name: Task Status Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a to-do status filter. There are five options:

Not Started


In Progress


Completed


Waiting


Postponed


For example, if this field contains the option Postponed, fields such as Next To-do Date will only display information related to postponed to-dos.

fields.name: Task Closed Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies that fields such as Next To-do Date only display information that is related to closed to-dos if this field contains Yes.

fields.name: Priority Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a priority filter. There are three options: Low, Medium and High.
For example, if this field contains the priority High, fields such as Next To-do Date will only display information related to to-dos with a high priority.

fields.name: Salesperson Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a salesperson filter.
If this field contains a salesperson code, fields such as Next To-do Date will only display information related to to-dos linked to that particular salesperson.

fields.name: Campaign Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a campaign filter.
If this field contains a campaign number, fields such as Next To-do Date will only display information related to to-dos linked to that particular campaign.

fields.name: Task Entry Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies that one or more to-dos are assigned to the team.
